discussion.content: All three core services (checkout, payment, order) are experiencing error spikes well above the 5% alert threshold, with checkout-service peaking at ~19.6% error rate. The issue spans multiple services, indicating a systemic problem rather than an isolated incident.

1. Correlate these error spikes with recent deployments (run the recent deploys query) to see if a new version introduced the regression. 2. Examine infra metrics for the hosts running these services for resource saturation (CPU/memory). 3. Drill into error messages for each service (e.g., `index=app_logs service="checkout-service" error=* | stats count by error`). 4. If a recent deploy is identified, consider a rollback of the offending version while deeper root‑cause analysis proceeds.

timeline: [Triage] All three core services (checkout, payment, order) are experiencing error spikes well above the 5% alert threshold, with checkout-service peaking at ~19.6% error rate. The issue spans multiple services, indicating a systemic problem rather than an isolated incident. — severity: SEV-2
